name: Jace Cole
description: A Carrion Star crewman pulled out of the Hollow network by D-Volt's System Hijack. Shaken, semi-conscious, and newly alone in his own head. Knows where the sealed container is and is terrified of what still wears his shipmates.
appearance: Mid-40s. Standard freighter coveralls with a faded CARGO patch. Eyes bloodshot from exhaustion or something worse. Moves like someone waking up from a long nightmare.

quirks: Looks for exits before answering questions

leviathan_crew.notes: Owes the crew his life. Unsure if they can keep him alive.

carrion_star.notes: Believes his shipmates are gone and something else is wearing them.

intel.container_location: Cargo bay, midships, starboard stack; chained down
intel.warning: They will let you take the box — they want you. Do not open a door they can walk through.

quotes: Cargo bay. Starboard stack. It's chained down like it's alive.
They don't want the box. They want you.
notes: If kept alive, Cole can provide interior layout details and personal context on Renner/crew. If returned or lost, the Hollow may attempt retrieval or mimic him.
